purpose: Heats water to optimal brewing temperature with thermal control stability affected by limescale accumulation

states.name: temperature_stability
states.description: Temperature control stability degrading with limescale

events.name: coffee_boiler_heating_warning
events.description: Coffee boiler is heating but message remains displayed

events.name: coffee_boiler_heating_stop
events.description: Coffee boiler heating to nominal temperature

parameters.name: limescale_accumulation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of limescale buildup per unit time

parameters.name: temperature_stability_timescale
parameters.description: Time for temperature stability to degrade significantly

parameters.name: temperature_loss_factor
parameters.description: Temperature reduction factor due to limescale

parameters.name: heating_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature stability threshold for heating warning

parameters.name: sensor_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature stability threshold for sensor failure

parameters.name: heating_stop_threshold
parameters.description: Temperature stability threshold for heating stop

state_transition_logic: limescale_buildup increases by limescale_accumulation_rate * dt, clamped to [0, limescale_capacity]
temperature_stability decreases by (temperature_stability / temperature_stability_timescale) * limescale_buildup * dt, clamped to [0, 100]
assumptions: Limescale buildup is the primary degradation mechanism affecting temperature control
Temperature stability degrades proportionally to limescale accumulation
Water supply pressure and quantity do not directly affect limescale formation rate
Brewing water temperature decreases as limescale builds up and stability degrades
All fault conditions are triggered by temperature stability degradation
